title: cotula minima
intro: Cotula minima, also known as small-leaved cotula or small-leaved false mayweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of cotula minima include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as diarrhea and indigestion. In herbal preparations, cotula minima is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it is also used as a topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
